sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61696" key="laka/qh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰκάθη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n61696.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λακάρη</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
